organization.description: Ziurtapen eta Zerbitzu Enpresa-Empresa de Certificación y Servicios, Izenpe is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Spain. It provides digital trust services via izenpe.com.
